case_title: LAUREN KRAMER VS. JUDITH MUROLO et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2014 - JUDGMENT.
